output.formatted:
Randy Newman

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?singer WHERE {
  ?song rdfs:label "You've Got a Friend in Me" @en ; wdt:P86 ?singer .
}
```

Execution result:
Got 1 row and 1 column:

| ---------- |
| wd:Q318475 |
